name: Bran Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together.
2. Dust dates with 1 tablespoon of the flour mixture, then add them to a bowl along with the brown sugar, all bran, and grated lemon peel.
3. Combine 3/4 cup buttermilk, 2 beaten eggs, and 1/2 cup vegetable oil in another bowl.
4. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture with the sourdough starter, stirring until well moistened.
5. Pour the batter into a greased or waxpaper-lined loaf pan (approximately 9 x 5 inches).
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Allow to stand in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and cooling completely on a wire rack.
8. Wrap in plastic wrap or foil and place in the refrigerator.
9. Use cream cheese or homemade butter on this bread for an out-of-this-world taste.
